problem.title: Right View of Binary Tree
problem.description:
Problem Statement:
Print the nodes visible when the binary tree is viewed from the right side.

Input Format:
- First line contains integer N
- Second line contains level-order traversal (-1 indicates NULL)

Output Format:
- Print right view nodes

Example:
Input:
7
1 2 3 4 5 -1 6

Output:
1 3 6

Explanation:
At each level, the rightmost node is visible from the right view.

solution.explanation: Traverse the level‑order array level by level, keeping the last non‑-1 value seen in each level as the right‑view node.
